meta.title: PlanningPub - MICE Platformer
meta.description: A new paradigm in the MICE industry, crafted by PlanningPub.

hero.body1: When the agency changes or the manager changes, every event starts from scratch all over again.
hero.body2:
PLANNINGPUB combines planner expertise with developer technology.
Through One Event, One Platform, we design platforms that grow continuously.
hero.body3: "We don't just run events. We PLATFORM them."

micePlatformer.label: WHY PLANNINGPUB
micePlatformer.title: Everything MICE, One Platform
micePlatformer.subtitle: Beyond a simple agency — a Platformer leading the digital transformation of the MICE industry.

platform.title: Platformized Event Planning
platform.desc: Simply issue an ID for the project period after selecting an agency — handover complete.

communication.title: Guideline Accumulation
communication.desc: Auto-accumulate mandatory tasks by event specifics and timeline, with AI analysis.

archive.title: Archive Automation
archive.desc: Generate structured folder trees matching event structure, auto-classify post-event deliverables.

data.title: Integrated DB Management
data.desc: Consolidate key participants, partner organizations, and registration DBs with automatic expiration policies.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: With creative ideas and tech-friendly professional execution, we create every moment of joy.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title:
MICE Platformer,
PlanningPub
about.intro:
With creative ideas and tech-friendly professional execution,
PlanningPub creates every moment filled with joy.
Redesigning individual events into platforms that enable sustainable growth —
that is the digital transformation of the MICE industry that PlanningPub envisions.

mission.label: MISSION
mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Leading the digital transformation of the MICE industry to build an ecosystem where anyone can plan and manage events easily and efficiently.

vision.label: VISION
vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: Becoming Asia's No.1 MICE Platform Company and an essential partner for event planners worldwide.
